name: Arm
hint: One of the upper limbs of the human body, extending from the shoulder to the hand.

name: Belly
hint: The front part of the body between the chest and the pelvis, housing vital organs.

name: Chest
hint: The front part of the body between the neck and the abdomen, housing vital organs.

name: Dermis
hint: The thick layer of skin beneath the epidermis, containing blood vessels and nerves.

name: Ear
hint: The sensory organ for hearing and balance located on the sides of the head.

name: Foot
hint: The lower extremity of the leg, used for walking and standing.

name: Gut
hint: The digestive tract or intestines, responsible for processing food.

name: Hair
hint: Filamentous structures on the scalp and body, composed of keratin.

name: Iris
hint: The colored part of the eye that controls the size of the pupil.

name: Jaw
hint: The bone structure that supports the teeth and forms the lower part of the face.

name: Knee
hint: The joint connecting the thigh bone to the lower leg, allowing bending.

name: Lung
hint: The respiratory organ responsible for oxygenating the blood.

name: Mouth
hint: The opening through which food is consumed and speech is produced.

name: Nail
hint: A hard, protective covering at the tips of fingers and toes.

name: Ovary
hint: The female reproductive organ that produces eggs.

name: Palm
hint: The inner surface of the hand, between the wrist and fingers.

name: Quadriceps
hint: A group of muscles at the front of the thigh.

name: Rib
hint: A curved bone that forms part of the vertebral skeleton and protects the chest cavity.

name: Spine
hint: The flexible column of bones (vertebrae) that supports the body and protects the spinal cord.

name: Tooth
hint: A hard, calcified structure in the mouth used for biting and chewing.

name: Uvula
hint: A fleshy extension at the back of the soft palate in the throat.

name: Vein
hint: A blood vessel that carries deoxygenated blood back to the heart.

name: Wrist
hint: The joint between the hand and forearm.

name: Xiphoid Process
hint: A small, cartilaginous extension at the lower end of the sternum (breastbone).

name: Yolk Sac
hint: A membranous sac in the embryo that provides nourishment.

name: Zygomatic Bone
hint: A facial bone that forms the cheekbone and the lateral wall of the eye socket.
